stemHtml: When flying icing conditions, which of the following may occur to cause a stall without any prior warning in the cockpit?

options.a: The AoA sensor frozen in a position with extremely high angle of attack.
options.b: Pitot tubes frozen over in the descent, giving erroneous indications of very low speed.
options.c: Ice formation on the horizontal stabiliser leading edge.
options.d: Clear ice on the wing, reducing the critical angle of attack by disturbing the airflow over the aerofoil.
